title: Create sumsar01/data-slate GitHub repo
description: Create the GitHub repository under the sumsar01 account for the data-slate project. Initialize with README and .gitignore.

title: Configure Cloudflare R2 bucket
description: Create R2 bucket in existing Cloudflare account for audio file storage. Set up API token with R2 read/write permissions.

title: Set up Railway account and project
description: Sign up for Railway free tier, create a project for the Hono API.

title: Set up Groq account and API key
description: Sign up for Groq free tier, obtain API key for Whisper large-v3 transcription.

title: Set up Turso account and database
description: Sign up for Turso free tier, create a database, run schema migrations for Note, SessionOverride tables.

title: Shared TypeScript types package
description: Create packages/shared with Note, Tag, SessionOverride types shared across apps.

title: Scaffold Bun workspace monorepo
description: Set up Bun workspaces with apps/web, apps/api (stub), apps/recorder (stub), and packages/shared. Root package.json with workspace config.

title: Inline entity links in transcript viewer
description: When viewing a log/transcript, entity names should be clickable hyperlinks that navigate to their wiki page. Entity data is already extracted and stored on the note. This is a frontend-only change: split transcript text by entity names and render matched spans as links to /wiki/name/{name}. Apply linking only after typewriter animation completes to avoid partial-name issues.
close_reason: Implemented inline entity links in transcript viewer

title: Add full log entry editing in admin panel
description: Add PATCH /notes/:id API endpoint and a new /admin/notes sub-route with inline edit form for all note fields (title, date, transcript, tags, entities) plus re-extract entities button.

title: In-world transcript flavouring via Groq
description: After Whisper transcription, call Groq to lightly rewrite the transcript replacing modern terms with 40K equivalents while keeping the original language. Store only the flavoured version. Add POST /notes/flavour-all endpoint for retroactive processing. Add button in admin panel. Re-run entity extraction on flavoured text during bulk operation.

title: Add Faction as a recording tag
description: Add Faction to the Tag union and ALL_TAGS array in both packages/shared/src/index.ts and apps/web/src/shared.ts so it appears in the recorder tag grid.

title: Session summary: generate via Groq and store in DB
description: Add POST /sessions/:id/summary endpoint that collects all note transcripts for the session, sends them to Groq (llama-3 or similar), and returns + stores the summary text. Add a summary column to session_overrides table in Turso. Display summary inline below the session header in the web app. Regenerate only on demand via a button.

title: Export: download session as markdown
description: Client-side markdown generation from loaded date groups data. User can export a single session or all sessions. Download via browser Blob and anchor download attribute. No API needed.

title: Delete note: API endpoint and UI trash icon
description: Add DELETE /notes/:id to the API that removes the note from Turso and deletes the audio file from R2. Add a trash icon to each note in the web UI with a confirmation step before deleting. Reload data after deletion.

title: PWA: add manifest.json and service worker
description: Add a web app manifest and basic service worker to apps/web so Android Chrome prompts Add to Home Screen. Offline support is not required — recording needs the API anyway.

title: Search: client-side filter across notes
description: Add a search input to the log viewer that filters notes across all date groups by transcript or title match as the user types. All data is already in memory from /dates so no API changes needed initially.

title: Pre-record tag reminder
description: If the user taps Record with no tags selected, show a warning banner. Tapping Record again confirms and proceeds. No API changes needed.

title: Re-record: add discard button before submission
description: After stopping a recording but before submitting, show a DISCARD button that resets the blob and timer so the user can re-record. No API changes needed.

title: Auto-refresh: poll /dates every 30s
description: useDateGroups should poll the API every 30 seconds. Skip polling if a note is currently playing or the recorder is active. No API changes needed — purely frontend.

title: Merge recorder into web app as /record route
description: Move recorder functionality into apps/web as a /record route. Remove apps/recorder. Delete recorder Vercel project. Single deploy at data-slate-web.vercel.app.

title: Deploy web app to Vercel
description: Deploy apps/web to Vercel, set VITE_API_URL to the Railway API base URL. Should mirror the recorder deploy process.

title: Recorder app - upload and transmit
description: On TRANSMIT: POST audio + tags to API. Show TRANSMITTING status, then COGITATOR RECORD CONFIRMED on success. Return to record screen.

title: Recorder app - audio recording UI
description: Implement MediaRecorder-based audio capture. Big record button, stop button, recording timer display. Dark Heresy aesthetic.

title: Recorder app - tag selection UI
description: After stopping recording, show tag selector: 8 large tap targets (NPC, Location, Combat, Clue, Tech-Lore, Rumour, Item, Misc). Multi-select.

title: Recorder app - scaffold
description: Scaffold apps/recorder with Vite + React + TypeScript. Minimal phone-optimised UI, same gothic aesthetic as web app.

title: API - Groq Whisper transcription
description: After R2 upload, send audio to Groq Whisper API. Extract transcript, derive title from first sentence (max 60 chars).

title: API - Turso CRUD endpoints
description: Implement REST endpoints: POST /notes, GET /notes, GET /notes/:id, GET /dates, POST /sessions (override), PATCH /sessions/:id. Wire to Turso via libsql client.

title: API - Cloudflare R2 integration
description: Implement audio file upload endpoint. Accept multipart form data, stream to R2 using S3-compatible SDK, return object URL.

title: API - project scaffold
description: Scaffold apps/api with Hono on Bun. Basic server, health endpoint, env config.

title: Web app - typewriter transcript reveal
description: When a note is selected, reveal the transcript text character-by-character in Fallout terminal style.

title: Web app - mock data
description: Create mock data: 3 date groups (Sessions 12-14), 8 notes covering all tags, realistic Dark Heresy content.

title: Web app - layout and navigation
description: Build the two-panel layout: left panel (session/date list + tag filters), right panel (note reader with transcript + audio player bar). Responsive for tablet.

title: Web app - boot sequence animation
description: Implement Fallout-style boot sequence on page load: scrolling INITIALIZING COGITATOR text before the main UI appears.

title: Web app - Web Audio API terminal sounds
description: Implement terminal sounds using Web Audio API (no audio files): click blip on note select, beep on tag toggle, chime on confirm, boot sound.

title: Web app - Vite + React scaffold
description: Scaffold apps/web with Vite, React, TypeScript. No UI libraries, custom CSS only.

title: Web app - gothic data-slate CSS foundation
description: Implement the core visual design: dark background, amber/green palette, JetBrains Mono font, scanline overlay, CRT flicker, corner-notched panels, Mechanicus header with cog+skull SVG.

title: Share link: read-only token for a single session
description: Add POST /shares endpoint that creates a record with a random token scoped to a single session. Add GET /shared/:token that returns DateGroup data for that session without auth. Add /share/:token route to web app that renders a read-only log view (no delete, no record button, no session editing). Needs a shares table in Turso.

title: Admin panel at /admin-mechanicus
description: Add a /admin-mechanicus route to the web app. Contains: export controls, share link management (future), entity index overview, and a trigger to retry failed entity extractions. No auth for now — obscure URL is sufficient.

title: NPC/entity extraction: async at upload, stored in notes
description: After a note is saved to Turso, fire-and-forget a Groq call to extract named entities (NPCs, locations, factions) from the transcript. Store result as JSON in a new entities column on the notes table. If extraction fails, no data loss — can retry from admin panel later.

title: Tighten CORS_ORIGIN on Railway API
description: Once the web app and recorder have fixed Vercel domains, update the CORS_ORIGIN env var on Railway to list only those domains instead of wildcard *.
close_reason: CORS_ORIGIN set on Railway to web-nu-nine-71.vercel.app; API updated to parse comma-separated origins

title: Web app - audio playback
description: Wire up the audio player bar to stream audio from R2 URLs. Play/pause, scrub, time display.

title: Web app - session override UI
description: Add 'Name this session' button per date group. POST to /sessions API. Add 'Merge with previous date' for midnight-split sessions.

title: Web app - wire to real API
description: Replace mock data in apps/web with real API calls. Fetch notes, sessions, dates. Handle loading and error states.

title: Recorder app - deploy to Vercel
description: Deploy apps/recorder to Vercel. Configure API base URL env var.

title: API - deploy to Railway
description: Deploy apps/api to Railway. Set environment variables: TURSO_URL, TURSO_TOKEN, GROQ_API_KEY, R2 credentials. Return API base URL.

title: Deploy apps/web to Vercel
description: Deploy the web prototype to Vercel under the sumsar01 account. Return the live URL.

title: Campaign wiki (entity index): design decisions needed
description:
Before implementing the campaign wiki feature, the following design questions need answers:

1. What is a wiki page — one page per unique entity (NPC, Location, Faction, Item), showing all notes that mention it, transcript excerpts, and sessions it appeared in?
2. Navigation — clicking entity pill opens wiki page, separate /wiki route with full index, or both?
3. Should wiki pages show a Groq-generated summary of what is known about the entity from all transcript mentions, or just raw excerpts?
4. Should entities be editable — e.g. merge duplicates (Krell vs Inquisitor Krell), add manual descriptions, correct entity type?
close_reason: Campaign wiki implemented: entity index (/wiki), detail pages (/wiki/:id), admin sync/merge/dossier, entity pills navigate to wiki. Groq usage admin-only.

title: Campaign timeline: design decisions needed
description:
Before implementing the campaign timeline feature, the following design questions need answers:

1. What is one entry on the timeline — one per SESSION (named group) or one per RECORDING (individual note)?
2. Layout direction — horizontal scroll (cinematic) or vertical scroll (mobile-friendly)?
3. What does tapping an entry do — jump to session in log, open inline summary card, or both?
4. Should the Groq-generated session summary text appear as a preview on the timeline card?
notes: Design decisions finalized: per-session granularity, vertical scroll layout, tap=expand card with Go to log button, minimal cards (no Groq preview). Implementing now.
close_reason: Implemented: vertical scroll timeline at /timeline. TimelineCard with expand/collapse, Go to log navigation. Nav link added to main header.
